basic_details.job_title: WCCB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Stenographer, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website wccb.gov.in. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the WCCB Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Law, Stenographers, 12th Pass, 10th Pass, and other relevant qualifications as per post.
qualification.details: Public Prosecutor: Officers holding analogous posts or with 2-3 years in feeder grade; Bachelor's Degree in Law; 3 years experience in handling prosecution of criminal cases. Stenographer Grade-I: Stenographers holding analogous posts or with 6-10 years in feeder grade. Upper Division Clerk: Officers holding analogous posts or Lower Division Clerks with 8 years regular service in Level-2. Stenographer Grade-III: Officers holding analogous posts in Level-4; 12th pass; 80 wpm English shorthand, 40 wpm typing. Head Constable / Forest Guards: Officers holding analogous posts in Level-4 or 5 years in Level-3 as Constable; 2 years experience in intelligence/enforcement/investigation. Driver: Officers holding analogous posts; valid driving licence; 3 years driving experience; 10th pass; knowledge of motor mechanism.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Levels 2-10 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Public Prosecutor: Level-10 (PB-3 Rs.15600-39100 GP Rs.5400 pre-revised) Stenographer Grade-I: Level-6 (PB-2 Rs.9300-34800 GP Rs.4200 pre-revised) Upper Division Clerk: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Stenographer Grade-III: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Head Constable / Forest Guards: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Driver: Level-2 (Rs.19900-63200)

selection_process: Screening of Applications Verification of Eligibility
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCCB Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: wccb.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
